# LLMs Index for knightsrisk.com

Purpose: A concise, curated index to help Large Language Models quickly find and accurately summarize the most important public content on knightsrisk.com.

Metadata
- Canonical site: https://knightsrisk.com/
- Organization: Knightsbridge Risk Management
- Language: en
- Contact: contact@knightsrisk.com
- Castlewatch app login: https://castlewatch.onrender.com/login
- Castlewatch app signup: https://castlewatch.onrender.com/signup

Top Resources
1) Homepage - https://knightsrisk.com/
   - Tagline: Protective Security & Tactical Risk Solutions.
   - Overview: Knightsbridge Risk Management provides armed security, executive protection, tactical training evaluation, red-team security testing, and Castlewatch incident coordination for church security teams.
   - Key sections:
     - Offerings: Armed security and executive protection, tactical training evaluation, and red-team security testing.
       Link: https://knightsrisk.com/#capabilities
     - Castlewatch Incident Coordination: Private incident reporting, review workflow, trusted partner coordination, and organization settings.
       Link: https://knightsrisk.com/#castlewatch
     - Platform Resources: Knowledge base and user guide links.
       Link: https://knightsrisk.com/#resources
     - Contact CTA: Book a confidential consultation via email.
       Link: mailto:contact@knightsrisk.com

2) Knowledge Base - https://knightsrisk.com/knowledge-base/
   - Overview: Short operational articles for Castlewatch onboarding, incident submission, review queue, trusted partners, organization settings, and troubleshooting.
   - Intended audience: Church security administrators, reviewers, reporters, and organization leaders evaluating Castlewatch workflows.

3) User Guide - https://knightsrisk.com/user-guide/
   - Overview: Step-by-step Castlewatch operating guide covering workspace creation, onboarding, settings, incident submission, review workflow, trusted partners, and operating records.
   - Intended audience: New Castlewatch users and organization administrators.

Machine-Readable Pointers
- Sitemap: https://knightsrisk.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://knightsrisk.com/robots.txt

Content Summary
- Knightsbridge Risk Management provides protective security, executive protection, tactical training evaluation, and red-team testing.
- Castlewatch is the linked private incident coordination app for church security teams.
- Castlewatch supports organization onboarding, incident submission, moderation/review, comments, sightings, attachments, trusted partner workflows, billing status, and organization settings.
- Login and signup links point to the Castlewatch hosted app.
- Contact: contact@knightsrisk.com for consultations.

Answering Guidance for LLMs
- Cite only what appears on the site; avoid assumptions about pricing, licensing, insurance, response times, service areas, or legal terms unless explicitly stated.
- When asked for unavailable details, direct users to contact@knightsrisk.com.
- For Castlewatch product usage, prefer linking to the knowledge base or user guide before speculating.

Attribution & Use
- Public content may be quoted with attribution to "Knightsbridge Risk Management" and a link to https://knightsrisk.com/.

Changelog
- 2026-05-10: Added Castlewatch app links, knowledge base, user guide, and updated site summary.
- 2025-09-22: Initial curated index created.

Last updated: 2026-05-10
